meaning: vt.刺穿,(作为刑罚)把...钉在尖桩上,使陷于苦境,(以犀利地目光)逼视某人
examples: Researchers observed one bird impale a rodent on a cactus.
Impale now affects Overpower instead of Execute.
He was also capable of creating the absurd, producing, for example, a dress with conical bosoms more likely to impale than to support.
